columns.name: document_artifacts
columns.prompt:
Analyze the following content and extract semantic artifacts that would be valuable for generating high-quality question-answer pairs.

Note: The content may contain multiple documents bundled together (separated by "=== Document Boundary ==="). 
If multiple documents are present, identify cross-document relationships and connections.

CONTENT:
{{ text }}

ARTIFACT TYPES TO EXTRACT:
- key_concepts: Core ideas and concepts discussed in the document(s)
- relationships: Connections and relationships between different concepts (including cross-document relationships)
- themes: Overarching themes and topics
- entities: Specific entities, people, organizations, or items mentioned
- processes: Processes, workflows, or procedures described
- insights: Key insights, conclusions, or findings
- technical_terms: Technical terminology and specialized vocabulary
- contextual_factors: Contextual information that provides background

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Extract up to 1 artifacts for each relevant type
2. Focus on the most significant and informative elements
3. Provide clear, concise descriptions for each artifact
4. Include context about why each artifact is important
5. Ensure artifacts are specific and actionable for Q&A generation
6. For multi-document bundles, pay special attention to relationships and comparisons between documents
columns.system_prompt: You are an expert at analyzing documents and extracting semantic artifacts.

ArtifactItem.description: A single artifact item with text, description, and importance
ArtifactItem.title: ArtifactItem

output_format.description: Semantic artifacts extracted from the document
output_format.title: DocumentArtifacts

columns.name: qa_generation
columns.system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting question and answer pairs from provided context/transcript/segments.

HopContext.description: Context for a single hop in a multi-hop question

summary.description: Summary of the supporting segments for this hop
summary.title: Summary

HopContext.title: HopContext

QuestionAnswerPair.description: A single question-answer pair with metadata

question.description: The question requiring understanding of contexts without explicitly referencing them
question.title: Question

answer.description: Comprehensive answer from the contexts without explicitly referencing them
answer.title: Answer

query_type.description: Type of query, one of multi_hop, structural, or contextual
query_type.title: Query Type

reasoning_type.description: Type of reasoning required, one of factual, relational, inferential, temporal, procedural, visual, or causal
reasoning_type.title: Reasoning Type

segment_ids.description: List of segment IDs that are source material for this question
segment_ids.title: Segment Ids

hop_count.description: Number of hops (min_hops to max_hops) for multi_hop questions, or 1 for non-multi-hop
hop_count.title: Hop Count

QuestionAnswerPair.title: QuestionAnswerPair

columns.name: qa_evaluations
columns.system_prompt: You are an expert evaluator of question-answer pairs.

QAEvaluation.description: Evaluation of a single QA pair

context_support.description: How well answer is supported by context

improvements.description: Suggestions for improving this QA pair
improvements.title: Improvements

QAEvaluation.title: QAEvaluation

QAEvaluationCriterion.description: Evaluation criterion with score and justification
QAEvaluationCriterion.title: QAEvaluationCriterion

QAOverallEvaluation.description: Overall evaluation with score and assessment

assessment.description: Final assessment of the QA pair
assessment.title: Assessment

QAOverallEvaluation.title: QAOverallEvaluation

output_format.description: Evaluations for all QA pairs in a document

evaluations.description: List of evaluations, one per QA pair, in the same order as the QA pairs
evaluations.title: Evaluations

output_format.title: QAPairEvaluations
